Description: An area of mind attunement is created, reducing damage taken for all who enter.
An area of mind attunement is created, allowing regeneration of HP over time for all who enter.
Sins are confessed. Additional HP is recovered when receiving the healing effect of certain spells cast by the white mage who granted this effect.
Sins are confessed, partially diminishing damage accrued. Additional HP is recovered when receiving the healing effect of certain spells cast by the white mage who granted this effect.
Standing tall despite damage that would normally result in incapacitation. Most damage is nullified. Unable to move or execute actions.
Standing tall despite damage that would normally result in incapacitation. Most damage is nullified and HP is recovered over time. Unable to move or execute actions.

Description: Back-up Dance resistance is significantly reduced.

Description: Bound by earth aether and unable to deal damage to the wolf of stone.

Windborne End
Description: Condemned by the element of wind to perish when this effect expires. Effect can be removed through contact with a font of wind aether.

Description: Moving too far from the bearer of the same lament will result in a massive explosion.

Lament of the Distant
Description: Growing too close to the bearer of the same lament will result in a massive explosion.

Name: Enhanced Egg Acuity
Description: Highly sensitive to the plentiful glimmer of Archon eggs.

Name: Golden Eye
Description: Any Archon eggs gleaned are guaranteed to be gold.

Name: Eggstreme Egg Acuity
Description: Highly sensitive to the plentiful glimmer of gold Archon eggs.

Description: Getting hotter by the moment, resulting in damage to those nearby when this effect expires.

Description: Bearing painted wings. Will fly forward when this effect expires.

Description: Bodily aether has become unbalanced by the influence of warm hues. Will take severe damage if hit by another Warm Bomb.

Description: Getting hotter by the moment, resulting in damage to those nearby when this effect expires.

Name: _rsv_4457_-1_1_0_0_S74CFC3B0_E74CFC3B0

Description: Failure to purloin tasty aether is inspiring pure and fluffy rage.

Description: Consumed by the Disco Infernal and condemned to strike a groovy pose when this effect expires. Failure to stand alone in the spotlight when posing will result in damage taken.

Wavelength α

Name: Cake Decorator
Description: Realizing an artistic vision of splendidly adorned cakes.

Name: Hard Worker
Description: Compelled by magicks to work hard, but not too hard.

Name: Harder Worker
Description: Compelled by magicks to work harder, better─and more specifically─faster.

Name: Hardest Worker
Description: Compelled by magicks to work even harder, at break-bolt speed.

Name: 草刈り参加
Description: 草刈りに参加している状態。

Description: Found to be a suitable conductor. Certain attacks will also result in a burst of plasma.

Name: Dead Man's Overdraught
Description: Aetherial amplification is increasing the power of certain attacks.

Name: Morbid Meal
Description: Queasy from eating morbol fruit. Unable to consume more until effect expires.

Name: Satisfied
Description: Empowered by aether drained from the not-so-innocent.

Name: Flesh Forward
Description: Infected by cells that will burst propulsively when this effect expires, resulting in knockback.

Name: Flesh Back
Description: Infected by cells that will burst propulsively when this effect expires, resulting in knockback.

Name: Bursting Grotesquerie
Description: Covered in rupturing cells, which will explode when this effect expires.

Name: Shared Grotesquerie
Description: Covered in fusing cells, which will create a concentrated explosion when this effect expires.
